List the main files or folders touched by this PR.

Explain the public source basis, normalization logic, and any ambiguity reviewers should check.

## Compliance Checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include patient data, private institutional data, user logs, or secrets.
- [ ] This PR does not include private BioMedPilot vocabulary, prompts, ranking logic, routing logic, or commercial-only search assets.
- [ ] Any vocabulary content added here is a candidate or example resource only, not claimed as production coverage.
- [ ] Any query fragment added here is a candidate or example fragment only, not a final production search strategy.
- [ ] I did not copy proprietary vocabulary, copyrighted database dumps, or commercial thesaurus content without permission.
- [ ] New JSON files follow the public schema and use only allowed public statuses.
- [ ] I placed files under the correct public paths such as `examples/`, `docs/`, or `schemas/`.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `pytest` locally for schema-related changes.
- [ ] I did not need to run tests because this PR only changes documentation or GitHub templates.
